title: The Sovereign
materials: Natural wood veneer marquetry on birch panel
framed: Unframed — arrives ready to hang or frame
shipping: White-glove fine art courier, worldwide, fully insured in transit
story: The largest and most complex original in the collection. More than 910 veneer pieces — individually selected, cut, and placed over six weeks — converge into a portrait of uncommon stillness and authority. The Sovereign does not ask to be noticed. It simply is. This is a work for a wall that can hold it: one that becomes the room it occupies, and defines every space it enters.
